response: Granola bars come in boxes of 12 bars per box, and each bar contains 90 calories. Maria has already eaten 3 bars, so the number of bars remaining in the box is 12 - 3 = 9 bars. To find the total number of calories remaining, multiply the number of remaining bars by the calories per bar: 9 bars * 90 calories per bar = 810 calories. Granola Granola
